request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 19,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b1",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "大流行病對我們2020年財務表現的主要影響是對新業務銷售的影響，原因在於我們眾多市場的遏制傳播措施限制",
      "current_translation": "The pandemic's principal impact on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures across our numerous markets restricted",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.672,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        93.17,
        521.58,
        105.12
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b2",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "了面對面的銷售活動，尤其是在2020年上半年。儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我",
      "current_translation": "face-to-face sales activities, particularly in the first half of 2020. Although new business value of USD 2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.668,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 58,
      "bbox": [
        68.04,
        109.17,
        521.57,
        121.12
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b3",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集",
      "current_translation": "rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported the recovery of sales momentum. AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to demonstrate recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively relaxed strict lockdowns from March 2020",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        125.17,
        521.57,
        137.12
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b5",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3",
      "current_translation": "onwards. Excluding the sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, the Group's other segments' new business value showed strong",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.678,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        141.17,
        521.57,
        153.13
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b6",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁",
      "current_translation": "recovery in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum continued to be strong in 2021, with new business value in the first two months exceeding that of the corresponding period in 2020 by 15%.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.462,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        157.18,
        521.48,
        169.13
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b7",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同",
      "current_translation": "recovery, representing growth of 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum remained strong throughout 2021, with new business value in the first two months being 15% higher than the corresponding",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.501,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        173.18,
        521.57,
        185.13
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b9",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "截至2020年12月31日的內涵價值權益創下新高為671.85億美元，於派付股息19.97億美元之前增加52.77億美元，",
      "current_translation": "Embedded value equity as at 31 December 2020 reached a new high of USD 67.185 billion, increasing by USD 5.277 billion before the payment of dividends of USD 1.997 billion, as embedded value operating profit of USD 7.243 billion offset the impact of the decline in government bond yields. Embedded value operating profit includes positive operating variances of USD 549 million, reflecting the continued positive experience of our overall operations compared to our embedded value assumptions.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 61,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        221.18,
        521.57,
        233.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "原因在於內涵價值營運溢利72.43億美元抵銷了政府債券收益率下降的影響。內涵價值營運溢利包括來自正面營",
      "current_translation": "This was due to embedded value operating profit of USD 7.243 billion offsetting the impact of lower government bond yields. Embedded value operating profit included positive contributions from operating",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.56,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        237.19,
        521.53,
        249.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "運差異5.49億美元，原因在於與我們的內涵價值假設相比，我們的整體經驗持續維持正面。",
      "current_translation": "variances of USD 549 million, reflecting our continued positive experience relative to our embedded value assumptions.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.773,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 42,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        253.19,
        435.51,
        265.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，",
      "current_translation": "Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove operating profit after tax growth of 5% to USD 5.942 billion,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.694,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        285.19,
        521.57,
        297.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以",
      "current_translation": "and maintained the operating profit margin at 16.9%. Renewal premiums collected increased by 10%, with recurring premiums representing 90% or more of total premiums collected in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.575,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        301.19,
        521.56,
        313.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投",
      "current_translation": "The growth in operating profit after tax benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the decline in yields on new fixed income investments and the reduction in assumed long-term equity investment returns.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.461,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        317.2,
        521.47,
        329.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b15",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此",
      "current_translation": "As expected, the exceptionally positive medical claims experience reported in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see positive contributions from this source to operating profit after tax growth. With AIA Thailand's lapse experience normalizing, renewal rates improved in the second half, with the Group's renewal rate at 95%.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        333.2,
        521.44,
        345.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b16",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所",
      "current_translation": "sources to after-tax operating profit growth. With AIA Thailand's lapse experience normalizing, renewal rates improved in the second half, with the Group's renewal rate at 95%.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.65,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        349.2,
        521.47,
        361.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b18",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "產生的基本自由盈餘為58.43億美元，增長了7%，是由我們有效保單組合的持續增長和我們對此積極管理所帶",
      "current_translation": "Free surplus generated was USD 5.843 billion, growing by 7%, driven by the continued growth of our in-force portfolio and our active management thereof, which was sufficient to offset the impact of lower expected investment returns. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's financial position remained very strong, with free surplus of USD 13.473 billion after the payment of dividends of USD 1.997 billion.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        397.21,
        521.55,
        409.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b19",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "動，這足以抵銷預期投資回報降低的影響。於2020年12月31日，本集團的財務狀況仍然十分強勁，於派付股息",
      "current_translation": "momentum, which was sufficient to offset the impact of lower expected investment returns. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's financial position remained very strong, with free surplus of USD 13.473 billion after",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.535,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        413.21,
        521.55,
        425.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b21",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "於2020年12月31日，我們的主要營運公司友邦保險有限公司（AIA Co.）的償付能力充足率仍然非常強勁，為",
      "current_translation": "As at 31 December 2020, the solvency ratio of our principal operating company, AIA Co., remained very strong at 489%. As at 31 December 2020, under the new group regulatory framework, the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio was 374%. Going forward, we will disclose the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio as the principal measure of the Group's regulatory solvency position.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 55,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        461.21,
        521.53,
        473.17
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b22",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "489%。於2020年12月31日，在新的集團監管框架下，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%。日後，我們將披露集",
      "current_translation": "489%. As at 31 December 2020, under the new group regulatory framework, the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio was 374%. Going forward, we will disclose the Group's",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.592,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        477.22,
        521.54,
        489.17
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "團當地資本總和法覆蓋率，作為衡量本集團監管償付能力的主要指標。",
      "current_translation": "local capital aggregation method coverage ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.641,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 31,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        493.22,
        353.76,
        505.17
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b24",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的",
      "current_translation": "The Board recommends an increase in the final dividend of 7.5% to HKD 100.30 per share, subject to approval by shareholders at the forthcoming annual general meeting of the Company. This brings the total dividend for 2020 to HKD 135.30 per share, representing an increase of 6.9% compared to the total dividend for 2019. This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which enables the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        525.22,
        521.47,
        537.17
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b25",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持",
      "current_translation": "Total dividends for the full year were HKD 135.30 per share, representing an increase of 6.9% compared to total dividends of HKD 135.30 per share in 2019. This reflects AIA's long-standing prudent, sustainable",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.542,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        541.22,
        521.47,
        553.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。",
      "current_translation": "and progressive dividend policy, enabling the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.593,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 34,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        557.23,
        381.43,
        569.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b27",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們仍然對友邦保險在整個亞洲地區的業務機會充滿信心。我們將繼續專注於投資資本，以實現具盈利的新業務",
      "current_translation": "We remain confident in AIA's business opportunities across the Asia-Pacific region. We will continue to focus on deploying capital to achieve profitable new business growth, leveraging our competitive advantages while maintaining prudent financial management and delivering long-term shareholder value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        589.23,
        521.46,
        601.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b28",
